content.full_text:
February 3, 2004

Sheila Scally, Manager
Nielsen, Merksamser, Parrinello,
Mueller & Naylor, LLP
591 Redwood Highway, #4000
Mill Valley, CA 94941-3039

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. W-03-299

Dear Ms. Scally:

This letter is to notify you that, at your request in a phone conversation on February 2, 2004, we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice regarding the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.

If you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
